top_stories.title: Anthropic’s Claude rises to No. 1 in the App Store following Pentagon dispute
top_stories.description: Anthropic’s chatbot Claude seems to have benefited from the attention around the company’s fraught negotiations with the Pentagon.
top_stories.author: Anthony Ha
top_stories.content: Anthropic’s chatbot Claude seems to have benefited from the attention around the company’s fraught negotiations with the Pentagon.

top_stories.title: Train CodeFu-7B with veRL and Ray on Amazon SageMaker Training jobs
top_stories.description: In this post, we demonstrate how to train CodeFu-7B, a specialized 7-billion parameter model for competitive programming, using Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) with veRL, a flexible and efficient training library for large language models (LLMs) that enables straightforward extension of diverse RL algorithms and seamless integration with existing LLM infrastructure, within a distributed Ray cluster managed by SageMaker training jobs. We walk through the complete implementation,...
top_stories.author: Bruno Pistone
top_stories.content: In this post, we demonstrate how to train CodeFu-7B, a specialized 7-billion parameter model for competitive programming, using Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) with veRL, a flexible and efficient training library for large language models (LLMs) that enables straightforward extension of diverse RL algorithms and seamless integration with existing LLM infrastructure, within a distributed Ray cluster managed by SageMaker training jobs. We walk through the complete implementation,...

top_stories.title: From Radiology to Drug Discovery, Survey Reveals AI Is Delivering Clear Return on Investment in Healthcare
top_stories.description: AI is accelerating every aspect of healthcare — from radiology and drug discovery to medical device manufacturing and new treatment methods enabled by digital twins of the human body. NVIDIA’s second annual “State of AI in Healthcare and Life Sciences” survey report reveals how the industry is moving from AI experimentation to execution, reaping return Read Article
top_stories.author: Kathy Benemann
top_stories.content: AI is accelerating every aspect of healthcare — from radiology and drug discovery to medical device manufacturing and new treatment methods enabled by digital twins of the human body. top_stories.title: Cognitive speed training over weeks may delay the diagnosis of dementia over decades
top_stories.description: NIH-funded effort finds positive outcomes with strategies that engaged mostly unconscious, rather than conscious, thinking.
top_stories.content: NIH-funded effort finds positive outcomes with strategies that engaged mostly unconscious, rather than conscious, thinking.

top_stories.title: Google AI Introduces STATIC: A Sparse Matrix Framework Delivering 948x Faster Constrained Decoding for LLM Based Generative Retrieval
top_stories.description: In industrial recommendation systems, the shift toward Generative Retrieval (GR) is replacing traditional embedding-based nearest neighbor search with Large Language Models (LLMs). These models represent items as Semantic IDs (SIDs)—discrete token sequences—and treat retrieval as an autoregressive decoding task. However, industrial applications often require strict adherence to business logic, such as enforcing content freshness or […] The post Google AI Introduces STATIC: A Sparse Matrix...
top_stories.author: Asif Razzaq
